title: Gemini 3.5 Flash 实时语音翻译模型发布
full_text:
Logan Kilpatrick on X: "Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Live Translate, our real time speech to speech translation model which supports more than 70 languages (both in and out), and is so natural.
It is available in the Gemini API, AI Studio, & Google Translate right now + coming soon to Google Meet!! https://t.co/nDiaqrbHgF" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Logan Kilpatrick
@OfficialLoganK
Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Live Translate, our real time speech to speech translation model which supports more than 70 languages (both in and out), and is so natural.
It is available in the Gemini API, AI Studio, & Google Translate right now + coming soon to Google Meet!!
00:00
3:28 PM · Jun 9, 2026 252K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Live Translate，我们的实时语音到语音翻译模型，支持超过 70 种语言（输入和输出），并且非常自然。 现在已在 Gemini API、AI Studio 和 Google 翻译中可用，并即将登陆 Google Meet！

key_excerpts.text: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Live Translate，我们的实时语音到语音翻译模型，支持超过 70 种语言（输入和输出），并且非常自然。 现在已在 Gemini API、AI Studio 和 Google 翻译中可用，并即将登陆 Google Meet！
5 Flash Live Translate, our real time speech to speech translation model which supports more than 70 languages (both in and out), and is so natural.
It is available in the Gemini API, AI Studio, & Google Translate right now + coming soon to Google Meet!
co/nDiaqrbHgF" / X Post Log in Sign up Post Logan Kilpatrick @OfficialLoganK Introducing Gemini 3.
